title: Recurring Relationship Dynamics
description: Certain dynamics tend to repeat across different relationships (romantic, family, friendships, or even with colleagues). These often reflect deeper patterns around needs, boundaries, and emotional safety.
observation_language: It seems like a similar dynamic keeps appearing in different relationships — especially around feeling unheard or having to adjust yourself.
There appears to be a recurring push-pull dynamic in your relationships that leaves both people feeling frustrated.
It looks like certain needs (for space, validation, or support) are consistently difficult to express directly.
underlying_fears: Fear of being too much or not enough
